inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Source Text
inputs.description: Any text to distil — article, notes, book excerpt, raw document. The AI identifies the subject and writes a structured entity.

inputs.name: database
inputs.label: Database
inputs.description: Wired database name — overrides the Database property. Connect a Global Database node here.

outputs.name: entity_name
outputs.label: Name
outputs.description: Entity name identified by the AI.

outputs.name: stub_count
outputs.label: Stubs Created
outputs.description: Number of stub sub-topics created alongside the main entity.

properties.label: Save to Database
properties.description: Turn off to preview the distilled entity without writing to disk.
